englishDefinitions: Prepare or organize that joke, prank, or comedy bit so it works properly.
persianTranslation: آن شوخی/حقه را سر و سامان دادن
آن لطیفه را آماده و منسجم کردن
examples: We need to pull that gag together before the show starts.
He spent all afternoon trying to pull that gag together.
Can you pull that gag together in time for the party?
